headline: Principal Financial Group: Dying Or Thriving? This 3.7% Yield Needs A Closer Look
summary: Principal Financial Group stock nears Dividend Aristocrat status with strong 2025 results, a 3.7% yield, and an undervalued P/E. Learn more.
